matches.sentence: If your Ketsuryūgan is active while this jutsu is active, on a successful hit the affected creature makes a Constitution saving throw gaining a rank of bleed on a failure.
A creature who would fail their saving throw by 5 or more gains 1 rank of bleed.
On a hit you deal your weapons damage + 3d6 and the target gains 1 rank of bleed..
On a hit, a creature must make a Strength saving throw or be knocked Prone..
If the result of your attack beats theirs by 5 or more, they become Dazed until the start of your next turn..
The creature must make a Strength saving throw, becoming restrained for the duration on a failed save.
On a success, you knock them Prone and they become Weakened, and their attempt to Grapple or Restrain you fails if they had tried to do so..

On a successful hit, the target creature takes your weapon's damage and is knocked 15 feet away from you and makes a Strength Saving Throw, falling Prone and becoming Dazed until the end of their next turn on a failure.
Failure : The target gains a rank of charmed against you and must spend all its movement trying to get closer to you for the duration.
If there is no place high enough it can reach that would deal fall damage, the target drops whatever it is holding and falls prone.
Failure : The target gains a rank of fear against you and must spend all its movement trying to get away from you for the duration.
If this jutsu is cast, and affects a Abberation , they gain 1 rank of Chilled.

Each creature of your choice within range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw, taking your [Weapon's Damage] + 2d6 Cold Damage and gaining 1 rank of Chilled on a failed save, or half as much and no ranks of cold on a successful one..
The target gains 1 rank of Fear for the duration and increases the cost of all their jutsu by twice their ranks of Fear.
On a hit, you deal 3d10 force damage and creature's must succeed a Strength saving throw or be knocked back 20 feet and gain 2 ranks of Bleeding.
If 2 attacks land, the target gains one rank of Burned for every 2 attacks that hit, and the next attack or jutsu made against that target is made at advantage..
Enemies hit by this jutsu must make a Con Saving Throw, gaining one rank of Burned on a failed save..
On a hit, they take 4d6 Poison damage and must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Envenomed on a failed save..
On a failed save, the target becomes Slowed for the next minute.
If you do, the creature only makes their saving throw once and on a failed saving throw, the target is also Restrained until the start of their next turn.
On each hit, the target must also succeed a Constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Chilled on a failed save..

Upon a failure, the creature is knocked 5 feet back in a direction of your choice, taking 2d6 Cold Damage and gaining 1 rank of Chilled , and becoming Restrained afterwards until their turn next round, or until they take damage, whichever comes first..

Upon a failure, the creature is knocked 5 feet back in a direction of your choice, taking 2d6 Cold Damage and gaining 1 rank of Chilled , and becoming Restrained afterwards until their turn next round, or until they take damage, whichever comes first..
If this jutsu is cast as a Chain 2 , the target creature takes half damage from this jutsu, but gains 1 rank of Chilled when hit..
If this jutsu is cast as a Chain 1 , the target creature gains 1 rank of Chilled , and is knocked back 15 feet on a failed save..
On a failed save, the target gains a rank of bleed, plus an additional rank for each die of damage it took from your Flash Sheath Stance or Latent Flash Sheath feature..
On a failure, they become restrained.

When you activate this jutsu Creatures within range must succeed a Constitution saving throw or gain a rank of weakened for the duration, a weakened creature can make another constitution save at the end of each of its turns, losing this rank on a success, a creature that leaves the jutsu area has advantage on these saving throws.
On a failure, the creature takes 3d8 damage plus your kick damage, is knocked back 20 feet, and falls prone.
On a failure, they gain 1 rank of fear.
You can use your action to attack a creature that is downed, regardless of whether you kill it or not (unless you are in a berserk state)..
If you kill the target, every creature within 25 feet that can see you must make a Wisdom saving throw or gain 1 rank of fear..
On a success, you knock them Prone and they become Weakened, and their attempt to Grapple or Restrain you fails if they had tried to do so..

On a successful hit, the target creature takes your weapon's damage and is knocked 15 feet away from you and makes a Strength Saving Throw, falling Prone and becoming Dazed until the end of their next turn on a failure.

If the trap was a restraining trap, the target must make a Constitution save or gain a rank of Slowed.

Make 2 ranged taijutsu attacks against any creatures in range dealing your weapons damage +1d6 and for every two hits you land with this jutsu on a single creature they gain 1 rank of bleed..

On a failure, they become Slowed.

All hostile creatures that can see you within range must make a Charisma save or gain 1 rank of fear and slowed for the duration as they start to lose the will to fight against such an inhuman threat.
